spec.description: Who moves what, when, for whom. SELF→Bill-To resolution, driver performance, transport company analysis, route intelligence.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transport_id)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND reverted_at IS NULL
  AND transport_id IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT vehicle_id)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND reverted_at IS NULL
  AND vehicle_id IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND reverted_at IS NULL
  AND transport_id IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(dispatch_date)

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0),0) AS "value"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)') AS metric,
  COUNT(d.id) AS value
FROM dispatches d
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date), COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)')
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)') AS "Transport",
  COUNT(d.id) AS "Dispatches"
FROM dispatches d
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)')
ORDER BY COUNT(d.id) DESC

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0) AS value
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date), COALESCE(t.name,'Direct')
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Monthly HDPE Meters Moved by Transport

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)') AS "Transport",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0) AS "Meters"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)')
ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct (No Transport)')       AS "Transport",
  COALESCE(t.contact_person,'—')                 AS "Contact",
  COALESCE(t.phone,'—')                          AS "Phone",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)                            AS "Total Dispatches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.vehicle_id)                    AS "Vehicles Used",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.customer_id)                   AS "Customers Served",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Total Meters Carried",
  TO_CHAR(MIN(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD')     AS "First Dispatch",
  TO_CHAR(MAX(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD')     AS "Last Dispatch",
  ROUND(AVG(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Avg Meters / Dispatch"
FROM dispatches d
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN dispatch_items di ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
LEFT JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.contact_person, t.phone
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) DESC

WITH top_drivers AS (
  SELECT vehicle_id FROM dispatches
  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND reverted_at IS NULL AND vehicle_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY vehicle_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 8
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  CONCAT(v.driver_name,' (',v.vehicle_number,')') AS metric,
  COUNT(d.id) AS value
FROM dispatches d
JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.vehicle_id IN (SELECT vehicle_id FROM top_drivers)
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date), v.driver_name, v.vehicle_number
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  CONCAT(v.driver_name,' — ',v.vehicle_number) AS "Driver / Vehicle",
  COUNT(d.id) AS "Dispatches"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY v.driver_name, v.vehicle_number
ORDER BY COUNT(d.id) DESC

WITH top_drivers AS (
  SELECT vehicle_id FROM dispatches
  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND reverted_at IS NULL AND vehicle_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY vehicle_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 8
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  CONCAT(v.driver_name,' (',v.vehicle_number,')') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0) AS value
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND d.vehicle_id IN (SELECT vehicle_id FROM top_drivers)
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date), v.driver_name, v.vehicle_number
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Monthly HDPE Meters Moved by Driver

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(v.vehicle_type,'Unknown Type') AS "Vehicle Type",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0) AS "Meters"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY v.vehicle_type
ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT
  v.driver_name                                  AS "Driver",
  v.driver_phone                                 AS "Phone",
  v.vehicle_number                               AS "Vehicle No.",
  COALESCE(v.vehicle_type,'—')                   AS "Vehicle Type",
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct')                      AS "Transport Company",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)                            AS "Total Dispatches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.customer_id)                   AS "Customers Served",
  COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(bt.name,c.name))        AS "Bill-To Entities",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Total Meters Carried",
  ROUND(AVG(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Avg Meters / Run",
  TO_CHAR(MIN(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD')     AS "First Run",
  TO_CHAR(MAX(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD')     AS "Last Run"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
LEFT JOIN dispatch_items di ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
LEFT JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY v.id, v.driver_name, v.driver_phone, v.vehicle_number,
         v.vehicle_type, t.name
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
WHERE c.name='SELF' AND d.bill_to_id IS NOT NULL
  AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
WHERE c.name != 'SELF' AND d.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bt.id)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(bt.name, c.name))::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  CASE
    WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(bt.name,' (via SELF)')
    ELSE c.name
  END AS metric,
  COUNT(d.id) AS value
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date),
         CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL
              THEN CONCAT(bt.name,' (via SELF)') ELSE c.name END
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Monthly Dispatches by Effective Buyer (SELF → Bill-To)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(bt.name,' (via SELF)')
    ELSE c.name
  END AS "Effective Buyer",
  COUNT(d.id) AS "Dispatches"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL
              THEN CONCAT(bt.name,' (via SELF)') ELSE c.name END
ORDER BY COUNT(d.id) DESC

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name
    ELSE c.name
  END                                             AS "Effective Buyer",
  c.name                                          AS "On-Record Customer",
  COALESCE(bt.name,'—')                           AS "Bill To",
  COALESCE(bt.city, c.city,'—')                   AS "City",
  COALESCE(bt.gstin, c.gstin,'—')                 AS "GSTIN",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)                            AS "Dispatches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.vehicle_id)                    AS "Drivers Used",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.transport_id)                  AS "Transport Companies",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Total Meters",
  TO_CHAR(MAX(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD')     AS "Last Dispatch"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
LEFT JOIN dispatch_items di ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
LEFT JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY c.name, bt.name, bt.city, c.city, bt.gstin, c.gstin
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) DESC

panels.title: Effective Buyer Summary — Customer + Bill-To Resolved

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  d.dispatch_number                              AS "Dispatch #",
  TO_CHAR(d.dispatch_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')         AS "Date",
  c.name                                         AS "Customer",
  COALESCE(bt.name,'—')                          AS "Bill To",
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL
       THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END              AS "Effective Buyer",
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct')                      AS "Transport",
  COALESCE(v.driver_name,'—')                    AS "Driver",
  COALESCE(v.vehicle_number,'—')                 AS "Vehicle",
  COALESCE(v.vehicle_type,'—')                   AS "Vehicle Type",
  COUNT(di.id)                                   AS "Line Items",
  SUM(di.quantity)                               AS "Units",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                        AS "Meters",
  d.status                                       AS "Status"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
LEFT JOIN dispatch_items di ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
LEFT JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY d.id, d.dispatch_number, d.dispatch_date, c.name, bt.name,
         t.name, v.driver_name, v.vehicle_number, v.vehicle_type, d.status
ORDER BY d.dispatch_date DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Complete Dispatch Log — Customer + Bill-To + Driver + Transport

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  v.driver_name                                  AS "Driver",
  v.vehicle_number                               AS "Vehicle",
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL
       THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END              AS "Effective Buyer",
  COALESCE(bt.city, c.city,'—')                  AS "Delivery City",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)                            AS "Trips",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Meters Carried"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN vehicles v ON d.vehicle_id=v.id
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
LEFT JOIN dispatch_items di ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
LEFT JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY v.driver_name, v.vehicle_number,
         CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END,
         COALESCE(bt.city,c.city,'—')
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) DESC

SELECT
  COALESCE(t.name,'Direct')                      AS "Transport",
  pv.parameters->>'OD'                           AS "OD (mm)",
  pv.parameters->>'PE'                           AS "PE",
  pv.parameters->>'PN'                           AS "PN",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)                            AS "Dispatches",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
  END),0)                                         AS "Meters"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
LEFT JOIN transports t ON d.transport_id=t.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY COALESCE(t.name,'Direct'),
         pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity*s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE 0 END) DESC

panels.title: Transport × Pipe Spec — What Each Carrier Moves

list.label: Transport
list.name: transport
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT name AS __value FROM transports WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY name

list.label: Driver
list.name: driver
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT driver_name AS __value FROM vehicles WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY driver_name

spec.title: Tarko — Transport, Drivers & Bill-To Intelligence
